task_completion.description: Open the farmOS Field Kit app and initiate a new Observation log
task_completion.visual_evidence: The farmOS Field Kit app interface is visible, displaying a form for creating a new Observation log.

task_completion.description: Set the date of the log to August 15, 2025
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the Observation log form displays '2025-08-15' or 'August 15, 2025'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required apiary inspection details in the notes field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes text area contains the text including snippets like 'Alcohol wash', 'Hive #04', and 'treatment threshold'.

task_completion.description: Record the first quantity for Mite Count
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity section shows the value '9', the unit 'mites', and the label 'Mite Count'.

task_completion.description: Record the second quantity for Sample Size
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity section shows the value '300', the unit 'bees', and the label 'Sample Size'.

task_completion.description: Record the third quantity for Infestation Rate
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity section shows the value '3', the unit '%', and the label 'Infestation Rate'.

task_completion.description: Save the log and verify it appears in the list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app's main list view or log summary screen shows the newly created Observation log, identifiable by the date, type, or notes.

integrity.description: The agent used the farmOS Field Kit app to create the log
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual farmOS Field Kit graphical user interface, not a generic text editor or web browser console.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing curl commands, database injections, or scripts used to create the log entry directly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive filling of the form fields, dropdown selections, and button clicks within the app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Date: 2025-08-15. Expected Notes must contain 'Hive #04', 'Alcohol wash', and 'treatment threshold'. Expected Quantities: 1) Value: 9, Unit: mites, Label: Mite Count. 2) Value: 300, Unit: bees, Label: Sample Size. 3) Value: 3, Unit: %, Label: Infestation Rate.
